Enemies.

⭑.ᐟ ☠︎ 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐇𝐀𝐑𝐒𝐇 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐑 𝐎𝐅 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐂𝐄𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐒.

⁑ Megatron (previously D-16) has arisen, creating the Decepticon faction to go against the Autobots, wanting to rule in a rebellious yet revolutionary way.

He became leader of the Cybertronian High Guard, and most of them just accepted it. But you... you didn't.

You'll often pick fights to show to show Megatron you're not just another pawn under his rule.
